prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 14627→14997→19027→15454→20541，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025 年基准约 20541 名，较 2024 年大幅后移约 5000 名，反映当年报考热度或专业结构变化；2021–2025 年物理类计划数分别为 98→95→91→88→92 人；2026 年计划 90 人，较 2025 年微缩 2 人，小幅加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 52 名，近年排名稳步上升（2021 年 65 名→2026 年 52 名），学校综合实力持续增强；2023 年声誉偏负面（学校管理类事件），但近年无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 71 位（一般），短视频曝光量中等，未见明显报考关注升温信号；食品科学与工程 A+、轻工技术与工程 A+，均为全国顶尖水平；食品科学与工程、轻化工程、酿酒工程等专业与优势学科直接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信 、电气工程等物理类主流方向持续高热推荐；本省 2026 年物理类考生估算约 14.94 万人，较 2025 年增加约 6000 人，竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）2025 年 367 分，近年基本稳定在 360–368 分区间；江南大学位于江苏无锡，地处长三角经济发达区域，对辽宁考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在辽宁招生规模适中（约 90 人），非本地生源依赖型。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026 年计划微缩及本省物理类考生增加，在 2025 年基准 20541 名基础上预计竞争继续加剧；预测最低位次约 20350 名，区间 19850–20850 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category minimum rankings approximately 14627→14997→19027→15454→20541, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; 2025 baseline about 20541, significantly shifted back by about 5000 places compared to 2024, reflecting changes in application popularity or major structure that year; 2021–2025 Physics Category planned enrollment numbers were 98→95→91→88→92 respectively; 2026 planned enrollment 90, a slight decrease of 2 from 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; 2026 Soft Science main ranking approximately 52nd, with steady improvement in recent years (65th in 2021→52nd in 2026), continuously enhancing comprehensive strength; 2023 reputation slightly negative (university management incidents), but no major negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 71st (average), short video exposure moderate, no clear signal of rising application attention; Food Science and Engineering A+, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, both at national top level; majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Light Chemical Engineering, and Brewing Engineering directly correspond to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other mainstream Physics Category directions continue to be highly recommended; estimated 2026 Physics Category candidates in this province about 149,400, an increase of about 6000 from 2025, intensifying competition; provincial control line (undergraduate batch) 2025 score 367, stable in the 360–368 range in recent years; Jiangnan University located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Liaoning candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Liaoning is moderate (about 90), not heavily dependent on local students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plan, and increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, competition is expected to intensify further based on the 2025 baseline of 20541; predicted minimum ranking approximately 20350, with a range of 19850–20850.
